_comment: Fixed brand copy used across slides. Substituted into the content-gen prompt and into the slide template. None of this is generated by Claude — these are the lines the brand has committed to.
hero_line: Your hero line — the short value prop you want to anchor to.
_cta_comment: List of single-word comment keywords your audience can drop to trigger a DM or follow-up. The content prompt picks one per carousel based on context.
_hashtags_comment: Default hashtags appended to every caption. The content-gen prompt may add 1-2 item-specific hashtags. Keep total ≤5 per current Instagram algorithm guidance.

example_attributions.correct: A 2024 longitudinal cohort study (Smith et al., NEJM) found that...

_attributions_comment: Example attribution phrasings used in the content-gen prompt as few-shot guidance. 'correct' shows the expected citation style; 'wrong' shows what to avoid. Replace with domain-appropriate examples for your brand.
